response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), but the role calls for a director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Tenure appears closer to ~11-14 years post-degree with no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or thought leadership at the scale required, and no evidence of cloud/AI strategy advisory work with strategic customers.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent tooling and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Track record of community contribution: talks, workshops, open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise required for a Principal AI role
Career level (Senior/Staff) is below the director-level IC bar; no evidence of org-wide technical leadership
Limited explicit cloud-platform strategy experience; AWS CDK mention is narrow vs. the breadth expected

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / AI products built
Seniority gap vs. director-level IC expectation
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work
